selectedOwner: docs/standards/automation-register.json plus authority and workflow owners
decision: Reject classification drift. CI stays admitted read-only, release remains disabled pending proof, interactive Claude remains foreground-only, and automatic Claude review remains retired.
evidenceRequired: Typed register enforces the exact 11-loop state map.
Every automation row has two addressable fixtures, owner, cost, five metrics, review trigger, and retirement.
limitations: Repository desired state does not establish hosted workflow or integration state.
nonClaims: Bounded desired source does not prove hosted identity, run, outcome, cost, or external consequence.
rollbackRevocation: Restore the accepted state map and remove any unapproved automatic-review workflow source.
